content_markdown: A natural process that could cause an increase in global warming is

options.label: A
options.text: an increase in the radius of the Earth’s orbit around the Sun.

options.label: B
options.text: an increase in the absorption of carbon dioxide by sea water.

options.label: D
options.text: deforestation as a result of natural ecosystem changes.

vibe_explanation: Global warming is driven by the concentration of greenhouse gases like $CO_2$ in the atmosphere. Deforestation (even if occurring naturally) reduces the number of trees available to perform photosynthesis, which removes $CO_2$ from the atmosphere. Consequently, more $CO_2$ remains in the atmosphere, enhancing the greenhouse effect. Other options like increasing orbital radius would actually decrease the solar intensity reaching Earth, leading to cooling.
